name: White Confetti Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt 1 1/2 lbs white chocolate with Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 1/8 tsp salt, 1 tablespoon vanilla, and 1 cup chopped candied fruit.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into a pan lined with waxed paper.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Turn out onto a plate and remove the waxed paper. Cut into squares.
